title: Industry-First Green Hydrogen Deals Signed by AndrexÂ® and KleenexÂ® Producer, Kimberly-Clark
content: Kimberly-Clark UK & Ireland, manufacturer of leading household name brands including AndrexÂ® and KleenexÂ®, becomes the first major consumer products company in the UK to make a significant commitment to green hydrogen, signalling its commitment to a more sustainable future. The company announces today that together with its energy partners, Carlton Power and HYRO (a joint venture between Octopus Energy Generation and RES), it is investing over Â£125 million into the emerging energy solution at its two plants in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria and Northfleet, Kent.
author: Analysts Account
